characters.name: Elara
characters.description: A young silver-haired mage in a travel-worn blue cloak.

characters.name: Garrick
characters.description: A grizzled knight with a scarred jaw and dented steel pauldrons.

characters.name: Pip
characters.description: A small street urchin, all elbows and grin.

scenes.title: The Gate at Dusk
scenes.background_desc: A weathered stone castle gate at dusk in heavy rain, torches guttering.

lines.text: Rain hammered the old stones of the castle gate, and the torches guttered low.
We should not be here, Garrick. The wards still hold a grudge.
Too late to turn back now. The gate already knows our names.
Then let us be quick, and quiet.

scenes.title: The Inner Courtyard
scenes.background_desc: A moonlit inner courtyard with a dry stone fountain.

lines.text: Beyond the gate, a small figure crouched beside a dry fountain.
You're the mage! The real one! Can you do the light trick? Please?
Quiet, boy. Half the keep can hear you.
A pale spark bloomed above her palm, and for a moment the courtyard was full of stars.
